# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Rule pack change
- [ ] CLI change
- [ ] Adapter change
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the PR focused.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated changes.
- [ ] I preserved local-first behavior.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, API keys, credentials, or customer data.

## Tests Run

```bash
npm run build
npm run ux -- doctor
npm run ux -- validate
```

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any context reviewers should know.
